tools.name: image_generate
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using an AI image model. Returns a persistent runtime-asset reference (assetId) that can be used in emails, reports, or sent back to the user in Teams. Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate (e.g. 'a photorealistic sunset over the Swiss Alps')

size.description: Output image dimensions (default: 1024x1024). Use landscape (1792x1024) or portrait (1024x1792) for non-square outputs.

style.description: Style for DALL-E 3: vivid produces hyper-real dramatic images; natural produces less hyper-real more subdued images (default: vivid)

quality.description: Image quality: hd creates images with finer details and greater consistency (default: standard)

model.description: Override the image generation model (default: openai/dall-e-3). Other available models: openai/dall-e-2, black-forest-labs/flux-1.1-pro

useWhen: the user wants to generate, create, or draw an image from a text description
the user asks to 'generate an image of', 'draw', 'create a picture of', or 'make an image of'
an image needs to be produced for use in an email, report, or Teams reply
avoidWhen: the user wants to edit an existing image — this tool only generates from text prompts
the user wants to search for or find existing images — use web_search instead
typicalInputs: a futuristic city skyline at night with neon lights
a photorealistic portrait of a golden retriever wearing sunglasses
a minimalist logo design for a tech company called HelkinSwarm
tools.returnsSummaryShape: assetId (UUID) pointing to a runtime-asset blob, plus the revised prompt used by the model

tools.name: image_search
tools.description: Search the web for images matching a query. Returns titles, source page URLs, thumbnail URLs, and dimensions for the top results. Useful for finding reference images, visual examples, product photos, logos, diagrams, or any image on the public web.

query.description: The image search query (e.g. 'SpaceX Starship launch', 'TypeScript logo transparent')

count.description: Number of results to return (1-10, default: 5)

useWhen: the user asks to find, search for, or look up images on the web
a swarm agent needs reference images or visual examples for research
the user wants to find product photos, logos, diagrams, or visual material
avoidWhen: the user wants to generate a NEW image from a description — use image_generate instead
the user already has a specific image URL — use web_fetch_page to read the page
tools.returnsSummaryShape: list of image results with title, source URL, thumbnail URL, and dimensions

shortDescription: Generate images from text prompts via AI image models, and search the web for existing images — outputs stored as reusable runtime assets

externalAccountsNeeded.description: OpenRouter API key — provides access to DALL-E 3 and other image models (required for image_generate)
externalAccountsNeeded.howToObtain: https://openrouter.ai/ — create an account and generate an API key; store in stamp Key Vault as OpenRouterApiKey

externalAccountsNeeded.description: Brave Search API key — provides image search (optional — falls back to DuckDuckGo image proxy search when absent)
externalAccountsNeeded.howToObtain: Free tier at https://api.search.brave.com/; store key in stamp Key Vault as BraveSearchApiKey
